client.label: Client
client.description: The end user's browser. Makes HTTPS requests to justinottesen.com.

github-pages.label: GitHub Pages
github-pages.description: Current origin. Hosts and serves the static site files directly. Free, zero-config, and sufficient as a starting point. Will be retired once the hosted server is ready.

static-site.label: Static Site
static-site.description: Plain HTML, CSS, and vanilla JS. No build step, no framework. Content is driven from structured data files (JSON). The site you're looking at right now.
